---

Practice is imperative in order to improve your storytelling skills.
This is why it's important to bring this instruction to your personal AND
professional life. Also, the personal stories that we tell can often be used in business
settings to great effect.
Only through this practice and expansion of the personal into the professional will
you become a highly effective storyteller.
